name: JSONPlaceholder
description: Free public REST API for prototyping and learning. Returns fake users, posts, comments, todos, albums, photos — all read-only fixtures. No auth, no quota. Useful as a smoke target when wiring api_setup or http_request.

auth.instructions: No authentication. All endpoints are public; mutating verbs (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) are accepted but no data persists — responses are simulated.

endpoints.description: List 100 fake posts (id, userId, title, body).
List 10 fake users with address + company + geo.
List 200 fake todos (userId, id, title, completed).
Simulated create — returns body + new id, but is NOT persisted server-side.

guidelines: Use as the default no-auth target when verifying http_request, api_setup wiring, or rate-limit handling end-to-end.
Filter via querystring (e.g. /posts?userId=1) rather than fetching the full list and discarding.
Treat all responses as deterministic fixtures; the same id always returns the same payload.
avoid: Don't rely on POST/PUT/DELETE side effects — they are simulated and not persisted across requests.
Don't use this for production traffic or as a CDN — it is hobby-hosted and not SLA-backed.
notes: Stable since ~2014; widely cached and mirrored across CDNs.
